task: Polish 14: 25+ i18n keys added for Welcome/CenterPanel/PerTaskConsole
summary: Polish 14: 25+ i18n keys added for Welcome/CenterPanel/PerTaskConsole
reason: Chairman: '继续' (Polish 14). Added 25 new i18n keys for the user-visible strings in Welcome.tsx, CenterPanel.tsx, and PerTaskConsole.tsx. The JSX migration (replacing hardcoded Chinese with t() calls) is deferred to Polish 14-prime because the module-scope Card/Footer helpers in Welcome.tsx need t-injection via props — a non-trivial refactor. The keys are landed first so the vocabulary is locked in.
